cvData.name: Alexander Mercer
cvData.skills: TypeScript, React, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, UI/UX Design, REST APIs, System Architecture
cvData.personalProfile: Innovative and detail-oriented Full Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience constructing high-performance Web-Apps. Passionate about responsive UI components, sleek motion design, and developer ecosystems.

education.skillsDuties: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science. Graduated with honors, specialized in software design paradigms, network security, and interface design frameworks.
Professional Certificate in User Interface & Modern Digital Aesthetics.

experience.jobDuties: Spearheaded front-end design systems using custom utility classes to boost load speeds by 30%. Guided engineering sprints covering full-stack Express REST APIs.
Iterated on scalable components and integrated interactive charts to display metrics elegantly for business-level users.

portfolio.description: A collaborative Kanban workspace featuring live dragging, custom indicators, and sleek dark layouts for tech teams.
A full headless digital store showcasing grid layouts, smart search, and clean payment interfaces.
